chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-3799 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders CMA No.15936/2025 2. For orders on office objection No.1 to 7. 3. For orders on Misc. No.15937/2025 (Exemption). 4. For hearing of main case. 07.08.2025 Mr. Sajid Hussain Shar, Advocate for the petitioner. --------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. Learned counsel for the petitioner under instruction, does not press the instant petition, the same is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS
